author: klasocki
text: Prioritizing classes and precission/recall for sequence tagger

author: klasocki
text:
Following [@apohllo](https://github.com/apohllo) 's idea, I implemented two ways of prioritizing precission/recall during training

* Using [F-beta](http://www.marcelonet.com/snippets/machine-learning/evaluation-metrix/f-beta-score)  as the evaluation metric, has impact on logging and annealing schedule
* Adding class weights to cross-entropy loss, enabling class prioritization (e.g less weight to errors on 'O' tag if we want more recall). Works only if using standard loss - no CRF

I'll submit a pull request in case you'd want to include these changes in your library :)
